sentences.target: Tu te déguises en sorcier ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ty tə deɡiz ɑ̃ sɔʁsje sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Tu te déguises en sorcier ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ty tə deɡiz ɑ̃ sɔʁsje sə swaʁ/
translations.en: Are you dressing up as a wizard tonight?
translations.es: Esta noche te disfrazas de mago.
translations.de: Du verkleidest dich heute Abend als Zauberer.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite você vai se fantasiar de feiticeiro.
translations.vi: Tối nay bạn sẽ hóa trang thành phù thủy.
translations.nl: Vanavond verkleed je je als tovenaar.
translations.uk: Ти сьогодні ввечері перевдягнешся у чарівника.
translations.hi: आज रात तुम जादूगर का वेश पहन रहे हो.
translations.pl: Dzisiaj wieczorem przebierasz się za czarodzieja.
translations.nb: I kveld kler du deg ut som en trollmann.
translations.id: Malam ini kamu menyamar sebagai penyihir.
translations.sv: I kväll klär du ut dig till en trollkarl.
translations.ro: În seara asta te costumezi în vrăjitor.
translations.cs: Dnes večer se převlékáš za čaroděje.
translations.da: I aften klæder du dig ud som en troldmand.
translations.ja: 今夜は魔法使いに仮装する。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; marks the subject of the verb.
Reflexive clitic pronoun (2nd person singular) forming the pronominal verb se déguiser; agrees with the subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; governs the prepositional complement introduced by en.
Preposition meaning ‘as/in the role of’; introduces the role/complement.
Common noun; object of the preposition en, denoting the role.
Demonstrative determiner modifying soir; forms the temporal NP ‘ce soir’.
Noun; part of the temporal phrase ‘ce soir’, functioning as an adverbial complement.

sentences.target: On lit une histoire de sorcier.

translations.fr: On lit une histoire de sorcier.
translations.en: We’re reading a story about a wizard.
translations.es: Estamos leyendo una historia sobre un mago.
translations.de: Wir lesen eine Geschichte über einen Zauberer.
translations.it: Stiamo leggendo una storia su un mago.
translations.ko: 우리는 마법사에 관한 이야기를 읽고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在读一个关于魔法师的故事。
translations.yue: 我哋而家睇緊一個關於魔法師嘅故事。
translations.pt: Estamos lendo uma história sobre um feiticeiro.
translations.tr: Bir sihirbaz hakkında bir hikâye okuyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đọc một câu chuyện về một phù thủy.
translations.nl: We lezen een verhaal over een tovenaar.
translations.hi: हम एक जादूगर के बारे में कहानी पढ़ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Διαβάζουμε μια ιστορία για έναν μάγο.
translations.nb: Vi leser en historie om en trollmann.
translations.id: Kami sedang membaca sebuah cerita tentang seorang penyihir.
translations.sv: Vi läser en berättelse om en trollkarl.
translations.ro: Citim o poveste despre un vrăjitor.
translations.da: Vi læser en historie om en troldmand.
translations.ja: 私たちは魔法使いについての物語を読んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun with 3rd person singular agreement; often used colloquially for ‘we’.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun histoire.
Common noun; direct object of lit.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement that specifies the type/theme.
Common noun; complement of de, indicating the story’s theme.

sentences.target: Mon neveu adore jouer au sorcier.

translations.fr: Mon neveu adore jouer au sorcier.
translations.en: My nephew loves pretending to be a wizard.
translations.es: Mi sobrino adora jugar a ser mago.
translations.de: Mein Neffe liebt es, den Zauberer zu spielen.
translations.it: Mio nipote adora fare il mago.
translations.ko: 내 조카는 마법사 놀이를 정말 좋아해.
translations.zh-Hans: 我侄子很喜欢扮演魔法师。
translations.yue: 我侄仔好鍾意扮魔法師。
translations.ru: Мой племянник обожает играть в волшебника.
translations.pt: Meu sobrinho adora brincar de ser feiticeiro.
translations.he: האחיין שלי אוהב מאוד לשחק כאילו הוא קוסם.
translations.tr: Yeğenim sihirbazmış gibi davranmayı çok seviyor.
translations.vi: Cháu trai của tôi rất thích giả làm phù thủy.
translations.ar: ابن أخي يحب كثيرًا التظاهر بأنه ساحر.
translations.nl: Mijn neef vindt het leuk om tovenaar te spelen.
translations.hi: मेरा भतीजा जादूगर बनने का नाटक करना बहुत पसंद करता है.
translations.el: Ο ανιψιός μου λατρεύει να προσποιείται ότι είναι μάγος.
translations.nb: Nevøen min elsker å late som han er en trollmann.
translations.id: Keponakan laki-laki saya suka sekali berpura-pura menjadi penyihir.
translations.sv: Min brorson älskar att låtsas vara trollkarl.
translations.ro: Nepotul meu adoră să se joace de-a vrăjitorul.
translations.cs: Můj synovec si velmi rád hraje na čaroděje.
translations.da: Min nevø elsker at lade som om han er en troldmand.
translations.ja: 私の甥は魔法使いごっこが大好きだ。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, masculine singular; modifies neveu.
Common noun; subject of adore.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; selects an infinitival complement.
Verb in the infinitive; complement of adore.
Preposition (contraction of à + le); introduces the prepositional complement to jouer.
Common noun; object of the preposition au.

sentences.target: Le film parle d'un jeune sorcier.

translations.fr: Le film parle d'un jeune sorcier.
translations.en: The movie is about a young wizard.
translations.es: La película trata sobre un joven mago.
translations.de: Der Film handelt von einem jungen Zauberer.
translations.it: Il film parla di un giovane mago.
translations.ko: 그 영화는 어린 마법사에 관한 이야기다.
translations.zh-Hans: 这部电影讲述一个年轻魔法师的故事。
translations.yue: 呢套電影講述一位年輕嘅魔法師。
translations.pt: O filme é sobre um jovem feiticeiro.
translations.tr: Film genç bir sihirbazı konu alıyor.
translations.vi: Bộ phim nói về một phù thủy trẻ.
translations.nl: De film gaat over een jonge tovenaar.
translations.hu: A film egy fiatal varázslóról szól.
translations.hi: फिल्म एक युवा जादूगर के बारे में है.
translations.el: Η ταινία μιλάει για έναν νεαρό μάγο.
translations.nb: Filmen handler om en ung trollmann.
translations.id: Film itu bercerita tentang seorang penyihir muda.
translations.sv: Filmen handlar om en ung trollkarl.
translations.ro: Filmul este despre un tânăr vrăjitor.
translations.da: Filmen handler om en ung troldmand.
translations.ja: その映画は若い魔法使いについてだ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular; modifies film.
Common noun; subject of parle.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a complement introduced by de.
Preposition (contraction of de + un); introduces an indefinite nominal complement.
Adjective; pre-nominal modifier of sorcier.
Common noun; head of the complement NP governed by d'un.
